allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\Usuario\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-Usuario-Desktop-TEST\\20a8c0ce-e39f-40d2-add1-9985605a2daa.jsonl' -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host "Total lines: $\($lines.Count\)"; $total = $lines.Count; for \($i = $total - 1; $i -ge [Math]::Max\(0, $total - 100\); $i--\) { if \($lines[$i] -match 'MELHORIA'\) { Write-Host "Line $i" } })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\Usuario\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-Usuario-Desktop-TEST\\20a8c0ce-e39f-40d2-add1-9985605a2daa.jsonl' -Encoding UTF8; $line = $lines[6864]; $obj = $line | ConvertFrom-Json; $msg = $obj.message; if \($msg.content\) { $msg.content | ForEach-Object { if \($_.type -eq 'text'\) { Write-Host $_.text } } } elseif \($msg.role\) { Write-Host \($msg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10\) } else { Write-Host $line.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(3000, $line.Length\)\) })
